About Us

Palanpur's Reliable Tech Partner Since 5+ Years

Veer Computer is a trusted name in Palanpur for computer sales, printer repairs, accessories, and CCTV solutions. We are proud members of FITAG and authorised dealers for HOC Technologies — a testament to our commitment to quality and trust.

🏆
5+ Years of Trusted Service
Serving hundreds of happy customers across Palanpur and surrounding areas with honest, quality service.
🔧
Expert Repair Technicians
Skilled professionals for all types of laptop, PC, and printer repairs — fast turnaround guaranteed.
📦
100% Genuine Products
All products are original, brand-authorised, and come with full manufacturer warranty.
What We Do

Our Services

From sales and repairs to CCTV installation — we cover all your technology needs under one roof.

💻
Laptop & PC Sales
Wide range of laptops and desktop computers from top brands. Best prices with genuine warranty and after-sale support.
Dell HP New & Refurbished
🖨️
Printer Sales & Repair
All types of printer repairs — inkjet, laser, multifunction. We service and sell Canon, Epson, Brother, and Fingers printers.
Canon Epson Brother Fingers
🔧
Laptop & PC Repair
Expert repair services for all laptop and desktop issues — hardware, software, OS installation, virus removal, and more.
Hardware Software OS Install
📦
Accessories & Peripherals
Complete range of computer accessories — keyboards, mouse, USB hubs, cables, cartridges, toners, bags, and much more.
Keyboards Ink & Toner Cables & More
📷
CCTV Camera Solutions
Supply, installation, and maintenance of CCTV surveillance systems for homes, shops, and offices. Secure your premises with us.
Installation Maintenance HD Cameras
🔌
HOC Cables & Tech
As an authorised HOC Technologies dealer, we supply professional cables, converters, extenders, switchers, splitters, and matrix products.
HOC Cables Converters Extenders
